title: Fyxe's Scary+
description: A spooky scary nightmare. Intended for those looking for a hardcore or horror experience.
body:
# WELCOME!
![Fyxe's Scary+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8922309f32e140ed998f2aba82af7c798f2922.png)

_It's 2024 and minecraft is too... plain. Time to spin the dial to 11._ 
## WHAT IS THIS? 
### TL;DR:
- Check the gallery to make sure you know what you're getting into...
- Danger and the Unknown lurk around every corner.
- It is meant to be played in Hardcore or with Limited Lives.
- Trust nothing, double check everything. 
- This was not made to be a relaxing experience, check out [my other modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fyxes-vanilla-modpack) if cozy is your vibe.

## DESCRIPTION
### Summary
Scary+ is an experience designed to test your fortitude. If you're here installing modpacks I'm sure you've played a fair share of Minecraft. Can you still beat the game when things aren't as bright and joyful?

Fret not! For there are additional tools to find and use along your journey. Evil may lurk in every crevice, but there is light to be found! Use it, while you still can...

I have added the [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) mod to help you document any mysterious entities you find. Perhaps they have a weakness?

### The World
If the day is dark, the night is pitch. Mobs are hostile not just to you, but to any form of life. Places are not the same as you left them, and new locations have appeared from places you can't imagine. 

Keep exploring! There is treasure to be found. With just enough grit and luck you can make it to the end. 

#### Still curious? Take a peek then. Be warned, you might not like what you find...
<details>
<summary>Spoilers Inside</summary>
  
- Light is paramount to survival.
- The caves are not safe.
- The ocean is not safe.
- Fear for your life on land.
- Find the books of knowledge.
- Unique weapons and armor will bring respite.
- DO NOT GET INFECTED.
- The Blood Moon is not your friend.
- Magic and enhancements should be sought and found.
- The day has become corrupt.
- Shallow graves dot the landscape.
- HE'S REAL. HE'S REAL. HE'S REA-
  
</details>

## ADDITIONAL NOTES
- I am still updating this pack and working on a mod to bridge compatibility issues, follow to ensure you get the latest versions!
- If you have any feedback please send to fyxeincfeedback@gmail.com
